question: Will the Reserve Bank of India decrease the policy repo rate after the February Meeting?
description:
This market will resolve according to the change in the policy repo rate resulting from the Reserve Bank of India Monetary Policy Committee’s February meeting, relative to the level it was prior to this meeting.

The resolution source for this market is information released by the Reserve Bank of India after its February 6, 2026 meeting, as listed on the official Reserve Bank of India calendar: https://rbi.org.in/Scripts/BS_PressReleaseDisplay.aspx?prid=60062

This market may resolve as soon as the Reserve Bank of India's monetary policy statement for their February 6, 2026 meeting with relevant data is issued. If no decision on the policy repo rate is issued by the end date of the next scheduled meeting, this market will resolve to the "No change" bracket.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 9, 9PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Rainbow Six Siege: DarkZero Esports vs STANDBY LFO (BO3)
description:
This market will resolve to "DarkZero Esports" if DarkZero Esports win against STANDBY LFO in the named Rainbow Six Siege match in the Six Invitational North America LCQ Playoffs, scheduled for January 9 at 7:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "STANDBY LFO" if STANDBY LFO win against DarkZero Esports in the Rainbow Six Siege match.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.

If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/rainbowsix/Main_Page.

events.title: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 9, 10PM ET
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Hofstra Pride vs. Towson Tigers: O/U 132.5
description:
In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for January 8 at 12:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Hofstra Pride and Towson Tigers combine to score 133 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 133, this market will resolve to "Under".

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

question: Spread: Mavericks (-6.5)
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 8 at 9:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Mavericks" if the Mavericks win the game by 7 or more points.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Jazz". If the game ends in a tie, this market will resolve to "Jazz".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Mavericks vs. Jazz
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 8 at 9:00PM ET:
If the Mavericks win, the market will resolve to "Mavericks".

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 10, 12AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: ASB Classic: Magda Linette vs Alexandra Eala
description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Magda Linette and Alexandra Eala in the ASB Classic, scheduled for January 8 at 5:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Linette' if Magda Linette advances against Alexandra Eala.

This market will resolve to 'Eala' if Alexandra Eala advances against Magda Linette.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: International ODI: India vs New Zealand (Game 2)
description:
This market refers to the cricket match between India and New Zealand scheduled for January 14 2026 in International ODI.
This market resolves according to the finalized match result as published by https://www.icc-cricket.com/.  
DLS/DRS, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a winner are treated as ordinary wins.
If the match ends tied and the playing conditions provide an on-field tiebreak (e.g., Super Over), the winner determined by that tiebreak will be used for resolution. If the match ends tied and no on-field tiebreak is used or available under the playing conditions (e.g., group-stage ODI with no Super Over), the market will resolve 50-50.
If the match is postponed/rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed. If the match is permanently canceled or abandoned or otherwise is completed without a winner, the market resolves 50-50.

question: International ODI: India vs New Zealand (Game 2) - Who wins the toss?
description:
This market refers to the pre-match coin toss for the cricket match between India and New Zealand scheduled for 2026-01-14 in India ODI Series.
This market resolves according to the official coin toss result (the team recorded as having won the toss) as published by https://www.icc-cricket.com/.

question: International ODI: India vs New Zealand (Game 2) - Completed match?
description:
This market refers to whether the cricket match between India and New Zealand scheduled for 2026-01-14 in India ODI Series is completed under the competition's official playing conditions.
This market resolves according to the finalized match status as published by https://www.icc-cricket.com/.
Any match where an official result is declared — including results decided by DLS/DRS, over-rate penalties, a Super Over, forfeit/walkover, or any other on-field ruling — will resolve Yes. (Draws count as completed results when recognized by the competition.)

question: International ODI: India vs New Zealand (Game 2) - Team Top Batter India Winner
description:
This market refers to which team's player records the highest individual run total in the cricket match between India and New Zealand scheduled for 2026-01-14 in India ODI Series.
This market resolves according to the finalized match statistics as published by https://www.icc-cricket.com/.
The outcome corresponding to India will be considered correct if the highest individual score in the match is recorded exclusively by a player from India.
The outcome corresponding to New Zealand will be considered correct if the highest individual score is recorded exclusively by a player from New Zealand.
If the highest individual score is shared by at least one player from each team, the market will resolve to Draw.
The market will resolve according to which team's player records the highest individual run total regardless of if the match is not competed (e.g. Due to weather conditions).
DLS/DRS adjustments and any other on-field rulings affecting batting statistics are treated as ordinary data.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without official batting statistics being recorded, the market will resolve Draw.
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and official statistics are available.

question: Big Bash League: Hobart Hurricanes vs Brisbane Heat (Game 1) - Toss Match Double Hobart Hurricanes Winner
description:
This market refers to the combination of the pre-match coin toss and the final match result for the cricket match between Hobart Hurricanes and Brisbane Heat scheduled for 2026-01-14 in Big Bash League.
This market resolves according to (1) the official toss result and (2) the finalized match result as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to Hobart Hurricanes will be considered correct if  Hobart Hurricanes is officially recorded as winning both the toss and the match.
The outcome corresponding to Brisbane Heat will be considered correct if Brisbane Heat is officially recorded as winning both the toss and the match.
In all other cases - including where the toss and match winners differ, or where no match winner is recorded - the market will resolve to Neither.
DLS/DRS adjustments, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, Super Over, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a match winner are treated as ordinary wins. If the match ends tied and the playing conditions provide an on-field tiebreak (e.g., Super Over), the tiebreak winner will be considered the match winner for this market. If the match ends tied with no tiebreak used or available, no team will be considered to have won the match and the market will resolve to Neither.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without an official match winner being declared, the market will resolve to Neither.
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and will then resolve as described above.

description:

This market resolves according to the finalized match result as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.  

DLS/DRS, over-rate penalties, forfeit/walkover, or any other on-field ruling that leads the competition to declare a winner are treated as ordinary wins.

question: Linette vs. Eala: Set 1 Games O/U 8.5
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Magda Linette and Alexandra Eala in the ASB Classic, scheduled for January 8 2026.

question: Solana Up or Down - January 10, 1AM ET
description:

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Set Handicap: Eala (-1.5) vs Linette (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Alexandra Eala and Magda Linette in the ASB Classic, scheduled for January 8 2026.
This market will resolve to "Eala" if Alexandra Eala wins by 2 or more sets than Magda Linette, based on the final completed score. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Linette."
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA results.
groupItemTitle: ASB Classic: Magda Linette vs Alexandra Eala Set Handicap +/-1.5

events.title: ASB Classic: Magda Linette vs Alexandra Eala
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Magda Linette and Alexandra Eala in the ASB Classic, scheduled for January 8 at 5:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Linette' if Magda Linette advances against Alexandra Eala.

This market will resolve to 'Eala' if Alexandra Eala advances against Magda Linette.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 10, 5AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Solana Up or Down - January 10, 5AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the SOL/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.
